top_signals.title: ‘Tipping point’: CBI boss slams £345bn business tax burden amid ‘cost of doing business’ crisis
top_signals.summary: The boss of the UK’s most influential business group will use a landmark speech to warn that the heavy business tax burden is nudging British firms towards a “tipping point”, directly linking the Labour government’s troubles to cost pressures on firms.   At a speech for the Confederation of British Industry (CBI)’s business dinner, chief executive [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Copper Tops $14,000 With Banks Calling for Even More Upside
top_signals.summary: Copper is trading just above $14,000 a ton in London, roughly $500 shy of its all-time high set in January, and Wall Street thinks it has further to run. Goldman Sachs lifted its end-2026 copper price target by more than 10% this week, raising its forecast to $13,735/ton from a previous $12,465/ton. The revision is driven by a weaker-than-expected supply outlook: the bank slashed its global mine supply estimate by 350,000 tons, citing ongoing operational disruptions at Indonesia's Grasberg complex and Ivanhoe Mines' Kamoa-Kakula operation in the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Elon Musk's net worth poised to sail past $1 trillion in SpaceX IPO
top_signals.summary: Based on SpaceX's updated IPO prospectus, Elon Musk owns shares in the company worth over $866 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: McKesson Unit Prices $2.25 Billion Leveraged Loan Ahead of IPO
top_signals.summary: A $2.25 billion leveraged loan for McKesson Corp.’s medical-surgical unit priced on Wednesday, ahead of its planned initial public offering.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid hits record share of global perps market as HIP-3 tops $62 billion monthly volume
top_signals.summary: Despite the bullish sentiment on HIP-3, Hyperliquid's pure crypto volumes are down significantly year over year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: EdgeX offers refunds and launches 200,000 USDC bounty after 71% token flash crash
top_signals.summary: EdgeX says that 174 addresses flooded a PancakeSwap pool with EDGE token sell orders during a period of low liquidity.
